defect: insulation resistance test skipped after repair
prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is High-voltage safety, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: insulation resistance test skipped after repair. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: OEM HV procedures, NFPA 70E-adjacent.
title: Identification: High-voltage safety (service call)
